name: Emporio Alnino
alt_names: エンポリオ・アルニーニョ
description:
__Height:__ 140 cm
__Nationality:__ American

Emporio is a young Stand User, born and living secretly in Green Dolphin Street Prison. He sympathizes with Jolyne and becomes one of her primary allies. Emporio's Stand, Burning Down the House, is a room comprising a secret, alternate space within Green Dolphin Street Prison, to which only he may grant entry. The room contains a number of useful, imperishable objects.

~!Emporio temporarily borrows the Stand "Weather Report" at the end of Stone Ocean.!~
